Rescore an existing evaluation run with different scorer(s).

Applies the provided scorer(s) to the predictions from source_evaluation_run_id
and returns a new evaluation_run_id. Original prediction call IDs are preserved.

Upsert a batch of completed calls directly to the calls_complete table.

Each call in the batch contains both start and end information.
This endpoint is used when calls are buffered client-side and sent as complete records.

AgentChatAgentHandoff.title: AgentChatAgentHandoff
AgentChatAgentHandoff.description: Payload for a future agent-to-agent handoff event.

AgentChatAgentStart.title: AgentChatAgentStart
AgentChatAgentStart.description: Payload for an agent lifecycle boundary.

AgentChatAssistantMessage.title: AgentChatAssistantMessage
AgentChatAssistantMessage.description: Payload for assistant text emitted by an agent or LLM span.

AgentChatContextCompacted.title: AgentChatContextCompacted
AgentChatContextCompacted.description: Payload for a context-window compaction event.

AgentChatMessage.title: AgentChatMessage
AgentChatMessage.description:
A single element in the structured agent trajectory / chat view.

Common event fields live at the top level. Type-specific fields are
grouped under the payload matching `type`, and exactly one payload must be
set. This keeps subtype nullability explicit while preserving a single
ordered timeline model for callers.

AgentChatToolCall.title: AgentChatToolCall
AgentChatToolCall.description: Payload for a tool call timeline event.

AgentChatUserMessage.title: AgentChatUserMessage
AgentChatUserMessage.description: Payload for a user prompt in the chat timeline.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of conversation turns to return.

offset.title: Offset
offset.description: Number of most-recent turns to skip. Results are returned in chronological order within the selected page.

AgentConversationChatReq.title: AgentConversationChatReq
AgentConversationChatReq.description: Request to get the multi-turn chat view for a conversation.

AgentConversationChatRes.title: AgentConversationChatRes
AgentConversationChatRes.description:
Multi-turn chat view: an ordered list of per-turn chat responses.

Each entry in `turns` corresponds to one trace_id, which Weave treats as
one conversation turn. This is not necessarily one `invoke_agent` span:
a turn can contain zero, one, or many agent invocations. The frontend can
render turn-number dividers between entries and still reuse
`AgentTraceChatRes` rendering for each individual turn.

AgentConversationMessagePreview.title: AgentConversationMessagePreview
AgentConversationMessagePreview.description:
A truncated first/last message snippet for a grouped conversation row.

`role` is the chat-timeline message type (e.g. "user_message",
"assistant_message") so clients can style it consistently with the full
chat view; `text` is the trimmed, length-capped preview content.

AgentConversationSpan.title: AgentConversationSpan
AgentConversationSpan.description:
One span in a conversation's trace.

Returned by `agent_conversation_spans`, which reads span scalar columns
only (no message bodies). Spans are ordered by `started_at`, which
approximates — but does not exactly match — the detail chat view's
parent/child tree-walk order. `operation_name` is the raw OTel value; the
client maps it to a display category.

trace_id.title: Trace Id
trace_id.description: The turn this feedback is anchored to; None for conversation-level.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Arbitrary descriptive tags applied to this feedback.

ratings.title: Ratings
ratings.description: Numeric scorer ratings applied to this feedback.

AgentConversationSpanFeedback.title: AgentConversationSpanFeedback

AgentConversationSpanRating.title: AgentConversationSpanRating
AgentConversationSpanRating.description: One numeric rating (a scorer score) applied to a turn or conversation.

AgentConversationSpans.title: AgentConversationSpans
AgentConversationSpans.description: One conversation's span sequence and its feedback markers.

AgentConversationSpansReq.title: AgentConversationSpansReq
AgentConversationSpansReq.description:
Request the span sequences for an explicit set of conversations.

Reads span scalar columns only (no message bodies) for the given
`conversation_ids`. Powers the conversations-list spans minimap.

AgentConversationSpansRes.title: AgentConversationSpansRes
AgentConversationSpansRes.description: Span sequences + feedback markers, one entry per requested conversation.

AgentCustomAttrSchemaItem.title: AgentCustomAttrSchemaItem
AgentCustomAttrSchemaItem.description: One custom attribute key/type observed in the matching spans.

AgentCustomAttrsSchemaReq.title: AgentCustomAttrsSchemaReq
AgentCustomAttrsSchemaReq.description: Request to discover typed custom attribute keys for matching spans.

AgentCustomAttrsSchemaRes.title: AgentCustomAttrsSchemaRes
AgentCustomAttrsSchemaRes.description: Typed custom attribute keys available for spans query/group/stats APIs.

AgentGroupByRef.title: AgentGroupByRef
AgentGroupByRef.description:
Reference to a field or map-key that spans should be grouped by.

`source="field"` targets a semantic span field (`agent.name`) or direct
span column (`agent_name`), allowlisted server-side. `source="column"` is
accepted for existing callers.
The other sources target keys inside the typed custom attribute Map columns,
which accept arbitrary user-defined keys.

AgentSchema.title: AgentSchema
AgentSchema.description: Aggregated per-agent stats from the agents table.

AgentSearchConversationResult.title: AgentSearchConversationResult
AgentSearchConversationResult.description: A conversation containing messages that matched the search query.

AgentSearchMatchedMessage.title: AgentSearchMatchedMessage
AgentSearchMatchedMessage.description: A single message that matched the search query.

AgentSearchReq.title: AgentSearchReq
AgentSearchReq.description:
Query the `messages` table by content and/or span-level filters.

Scans the `messages` table (one row per message occurrence, populated by an
MV from spans) and returns matching span-level hits. Full-text search sets
`query`; structured retrieval (e.g. all messages in a trace) leaves `query`
empty and uses the filters below. The caller groups by conversation for the
response shape.

AgentSearchRes.title: AgentSearchRes
AgentSearchRes.description: Response from a full-text search across agent messages.

AgentSortBy.title: AgentSortBy
AgentSortBy.description: Sort specification for agent query endpoints.

AgentSpanGroupDistributionBin.title: AgentSpanGroupDistributionBin
AgentSpanGroupDistributionBin.description: One numeric histogram bin for a custom attribute in a span group.

AgentSpanGroupDistributionItem.title: AgentSpanGroupDistributionItem
AgentSpanGroupDistributionItem.description: Distribution data for one span-group/custom-attribute pair.

AgentSpanGroupDistributionSpec.title: AgentSpanGroupDistributionSpec
AgentSpanGroupDistributionSpec.description: One custom attribute distribution to compute per returned span group.

AgentSpanGroupDistributionValue.title: AgentSpanGroupDistributionValue
AgentSpanGroupDistributionValue.description: One categorical custom attribute value count in a span group.

AgentSpanGroupFilter.title: AgentSpanGroupFilter
AgentSpanGroupFilter.description: Range filter over one grouped span measure.

AgentSpanGroupRow.title: AgentSpanGroupRow
AgentSpanGroupRow.description:
A single row in a grouped spans query response.

`group_keys` maps each group_by ref's alias to its value for this row.
The remaining fields are a fixed aggregate bundle computed per group.

AgentSpanMeasureSpec.title: AgentSpanMeasureSpec
AgentSpanMeasureSpec.description: One aggregate measure computed over spans in a group or bucket.

AgentSpanSchema.title: AgentSpanSchema
AgentSpanSchema.description: A normalized agent span returned by query APIs.

AgentSpanStatsColumn.title: AgentSpanStatsColumn
AgentSpanStatsColumn.description: Metadata describing one column in an agent span stats result row.

AgentSpanStatsMetricSpec.title: AgentSpanStatsMetricSpec
AgentSpanStatsMetricSpec.description: Metric to extract from each matching span and aggregate into chart rows.

AgentSpanStatsNumericBucketSpec.title: AgentSpanStatsNumericBucketSpec
AgentSpanStatsNumericBucketSpec.description: Bucket stats rows by ranges of one numeric span or grouped value.

AgentSpanStatsReq.title: AgentSpanStatsReq
AgentSpanStatsReq.description: Request chart-ready aggregations over GenAI agent spans.

AgentSpanStatsRes.title: AgentSpanStatsRes
AgentSpanStatsRes.description: Response containing chart-ready agent span stats rows.

AgentSpanStatsTimeBucketSpec.title: AgentSpanStatsTimeBucketSpec
AgentSpanStatsTimeBucketSpec.description: Bucket stats rows by started_at time intervals.

AgentSpanValueRef.title: AgentSpanValueRef
AgentSpanValueRef.description: Reference to a span field or typed custom attribute map value.

AgentSpansQueryReq.title: AgentSpansQueryReq
AgentSpansQueryReq.description:
Request to query agent spans for a project.

When `group_by` is empty (or omitted), returns raw span rows in the
response's `spans` field. When `group_by` is non-empty, returns
aggregate group rows in the response's `groups` field.

AgentSpansQueryRes.title: AgentSpansQueryRes
AgentSpansQueryRes.description:
Response from a spans query.

Exactly one of `spans` or `groups` will be populated, based on
whether the request specified `group_by`.

AgentTraceChatReq.title: AgentTraceChatReq
AgentTraceChatReq.description: Request to get the structured chat / trajectory view for a trace.

total_duration_ms.title: Total Duration Ms
total_duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the trace root span in milliseconds. This is not a sum of child span durations.

AgentTraceChatRes.title: AgentTraceChatRes
AgentTraceChatRes.description:
Structured chat view: a linear sequence of messages representing
the agent trajectory for a single trace.

AgentVersionSchema.title: AgentVersionSchema
AgentVersionSchema.description: Aggregated per-version stats from the agent_versions AMT.

AgentVersionsQueryReq.title: AgentVersionsQueryReq
AgentVersionsQueryReq.description: Request to list versions for an agent.

AgentsQueryReq.title: AgentsQueryReq
AgentsQueryReq.description: Request to list agents with aggregated stats for a project.

AggregationType.title: AggregationType
AggregationType.description: Aggregation functions supported by feedback and call stats metrics.

AndOperation.title: AndOperation

display_fields.title: Display Fields
display_fields.description: JSON paths to display to annotators

AnnotationQueueAddCallsBody.title: AnnotationQueueAddCallsBody
AnnotationQueueAddCallsBody.description: Request body for adding calls to an annotation queue (queue_id comes from path).

AnnotationQueueAddCallsRes.title: AnnotationQueueAddCallsRes
AnnotationQueueAddCallsRes.description: Response from adding calls to a queue.

wb_user_id.title: Wb User Id
wb_user_id.description: Do not set directly. Server will automatically populate this field.

AnnotationQueueCreateReq.title: AnnotationQueueCreateReq
AnnotationQueueCreateReq.description: Request to create a new annotation queue.

AnnotationQueueCreateRes.title: AnnotationQueueCreateRes
AnnotationQueueCreateRes.description: Response from creating an annotation queue.

AnnotationQueueDeleteRes.title: AnnotationQueueDeleteRes
AnnotationQueueDeleteRes.description: Response from deleting an annotation queue.

AnnotationQueueItemProgressUpdateBody.title: AnnotationQueueItemProgressUpdateBody
AnnotationQueueItemProgressUpdateBody.description:
Request body for updating annotation progress (queue_id and item_id come from path).

Note: wb_user_id is not included in the body - it's set server-side from the authenticated session.

AnnotationQueueItemSchema.title: AnnotationQueueItemSchema
AnnotationQueueItemSchema.description: Schema for annotation queue item responses.

id.title: Id
id.description: Filter by exact queue item ID

added_by.title: Added By
added_by.description: Filter by W&B user ID who added the call

annotation_states.title: Annotation States
annotation_states.description: Filter by annotation states (unstarted, in_progress, completed, skipped)

AnnotationQueueItemsFilter.title: AnnotationQueueItemsFilter
AnnotationQueueItemsFilter.description:
Simple filter for annotation queue items.

Supports equality filtering on call metadata fields and IN filtering on annotation state.

filter.description: Filter queue items by call metadata and annotation state

sort_by.title: Sort By
sort_by.description: Sort by multiple fields (e.g., created_at, updated_at)

include_position.title: Include Position
include_position.description: Include position_in_queue field (1-based index in full queue)

AnnotationQueueItemsQueryBody.title: AnnotationQueueItemsQueryBody
AnnotationQueueItemsQueryBody.description: Request body for querying items in an annotation queue (queue_id comes from path).

AnnotationQueueItemsQueryRes.title: AnnotationQueueItemsQueryRes
AnnotationQueueItemsQueryRes.description: Response from querying annotation queue items.

AnnotationQueueReadRes.title: AnnotationQueueReadRes
AnnotationQueueReadRes.description: Response from reading an annotation queue.

total_items.title: Total Items
total_items.description: Total number of items in the queue

completed_items.title: Completed Items
completed_items.description: Number of items completed or skipped by at least one annotator

AnnotationQueueStatsSchema.title: AnnotationQueueStatsSchema
AnnotationQueueStatsSchema.description: Statistics for a single annotation queue.

AnnotationQueueUpdateBody.title: AnnotationQueueUpdateBody
AnnotationQueueUpdateBody.description:
Request body for updating an annotation queue (queue_id comes from path).

All fields except project_id are optional - only provided fields will be updated.

AnnotationQueueUpdateRes.title: AnnotationQueueUpdateRes
AnnotationQueueUpdateRes.description: Response from updating an annotation queue.

name.title: Name
name.description: Filter by queue name (case-insensitive partial match)

sort_by.title: Sort By
sort_by.description: Sort by multiple fields (e.g., created_at, updated_at, name)

AnnotationQueuesQueryReq.title: AnnotationQueuesQueryReq
AnnotationQueuesQueryReq.description: Request to query annotation queues for a project.

queue_ids.title: Queue Ids
queue_ids.description: List of queue IDs to get stats for

AnnotationQueuesStatsReq.title: AnnotationQueuesStatsReq
AnnotationQueuesStatsReq.description: Request to get stats for multiple annotation queues.

AnnotationQueuesStatsRes.title: AnnotationQueuesStatsRes
AnnotationQueuesStatsRes.description: Response with stats for multiple annotation queues.

percentiles.title: Percentiles
percentiles.description: Percentile values to compute (0-100). E.g., [50, 95, 99] for p50, p95, p99

CallMetricSpec.title: CallMetricSpec
CallMetricSpec.description: Specification for a call-level metric to aggregate (not grouped by model).

expire_at.title: Expire At
expire_at.description: Expiration timestamp for this call. None = no TTL configured for the project (the row will not be expired).

end.title: End
end.description: Exclusive end time (UTC, ISO 8601). Defaults to now if omitted.

granularity.title: Granularity
granularity.description: Bucket size in seconds (e.g., 3600 for 1 hour). If omitted, auto-selected based on time range. Will be adjusted if it would produce more than 10,000 buckets.

usage_metrics.title: Usage Metrics
usage_metrics.description: Usage metrics (tokens, cost) to compute. Grouped by timestamp and model.

call_metrics.title: Call Metrics
call_metrics.description: Call-level metrics (latency, counts) to compute. Grouped by timestamp only.

CallStatsReq.title: CallStatsReq
CallStatsReq.description: Request for aggregated call statistics over a time range.

usage_buckets.title: Usage Buckets
usage_buckets.description: Usage metrics by model. Each bucket contains 'timestamp', 'model', and aggregated metric values.

call_buckets.title: Call Buckets
call_buckets.description: Call-level metrics. Each bucket contains 'timestamp' and aggregated metric values.

wb_user_id.title: Wb User Id
wb_user_id.description: Do not set directly. Server will automatically populate this field.

wb_user_id.title: Wb User Id
wb_user_id.description: Do not set directly. Server will automatically populate this field.

include_costs.title: Include Costs
include_costs.description: Beta, subject to change. If true, the response will include any model costs for each call.

include_feedback.title: Include Feedback
include_feedback.description: Beta, subject to change. If true, the response will include feedback for each call.

include_storage_size.title: Include Storage Size
include_storage_size.description: Beta, subject to change. If true, the response will include the storage size for a call.

include_total_storage_size.title: Include Total Storage Size
include_total_storage_size.description: Beta, subject to change. If true, the response will include the total storage size for a trace.

include_usernames.title: Include Usernames
include_usernames.description: If true, the response will attempt to resolve each call's wb_user_id to a username for the duration of this request.

expand_columns.title: Expand Columns
expand_columns.description: Columns to expand, i.e. refs to other objects

return_expanded_column_values.title: Return Expanded Column Values
return_expanded_column_values.description: If true, the response will include raw values for expanded columns. If false, the response expand_columns will only be used for filtering and ordering. This is useful for clients that want to resolve refs themselves, e.g. for performance reasons.

expand_columns.title: Expand Columns
expand_columns.description: Columns with refs to objects or table rows that require expansion during filtering or ordering.

call_ids.title: Call Ids
call_ids.description: List of call IDs to score

scorer_refs.title: Scorer Refs
scorer_refs.description: List of scorer refs to apply

wb_user_id.title: Wb User Id
wb_user_id.description: Do not set directly. Server will automatically populate this field.

CallsScoreReq.title: CallsScoreReq
CallsScoreReq.description:
Request to enqueue scoring jobs for a list of calls.

Scoring is performed asynchronously by the call_scoring_worker, which
consumes messages from Kafka and applies each scorer_ref to each call_id.

CallsScoreRes.title: CallsScoreRes
CallsScoreRes.description:
Empty response for calls_score.

Defined as a model (rather than returning None) to follow the convention
used throughout this interface and to allow fields to be added later
without a breaking change.

CallsUpsertCompleteReq.title: CallsUpsertCompleteReq
CallsUpsertCompleteReq.description: Request for upserting a batch of completed calls.

CallsUpsertCompleteRes.title: CallsUpsertCompleteRes
CallsUpsertCompleteRes.description: Response for upserting a batch of completed calls.

call_ids.title: Call Ids
call_ids.description: Root call IDs to aggregate. Each result key corresponds to one input call ID.

include_costs.title: Include Costs
include_costs.description: If true, include cost calculations in the usage.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of calls to process across all traces. Acts as a safety limit to prevent unbounded memory usage.

CallsUsageReq.title: CallsUsageReq
CallsUsageReq.description:
Request to compute aggregated usage for multiple root calls.

This endpoint returns usage metrics for each requested root call, where each
root's metrics include the sum of its own usage plus all descendants' usage.

Note: All matching calls are loaded into memory for aggregation. For very large
result sets (>10k calls), consider batching root call IDs or using narrower
filters at the application layer.

CallsUsageRes.title: CallsUsageRes
CallsUsageRes.description: Response with aggregated usage metrics per root call.

wb_user_id.title: Wb User Id
wb_user_id.description: Do not set directly. Server will automatically populate this field.

CompletedCallSchemaForInsert.title: CompletedCallSchemaForInsert
CompletedCallSchemaForInsert.description:
Schema for inserting a completed call directly.

This represents a call that is already finished at insertion time, with both
start and end information provided together. Used by the calls_complete endpoint.

ContainsOperation.title: ContainsOperation

ContainsSpec.title: ContainsSpec
ContainsSpec.description:
Specification for the `$contains` operation.

- `input`: The string to search.
- `substr`: The substring to search for.
- `case_insensitive`: If true, match is case-insensitive.

ConvertOperation.title: ConvertOperation

ConvertSpec.title: ConvertSpec
ConvertSpec.description:
Specifies conversion details for `$convert`.

- `input`: The operand to convert.
- `to`: The type to convert to.

cache_read.title: Cache Read
cache_read.description: Cost per million cached read tokens (USD).

cache_write.title: Cache Write
cache_write.description: Cost per million cached write tokens (USD).

input_audio.title: Input Audio
input_audio.description: Cost per million audio input tokens (USD).

output_audio.title: Output Audio
output_audio.description: Cost per million audio output tokens (USD).

Cost.title: Cost
Cost.description: Costs are expressed in USD per million tokens.

prompt_token_cost_unit.title: Prompt Token Cost Unit
prompt_token_cost_unit.description: The unit of the cost for the prompt tokens

completion_token_cost_unit.title: Completion Token Cost Unit
completion_token_cost_unit.description: The unit of the cost for the completion tokens

effective_date.title: Effective Date
effective_date.description: The date after which the cost is effective for, will default to the current date if not provided

provider_id.title: Provider Id
provider_id.description: The provider of the LLM, e.g. 'openai' or 'mistral'. If not provided, the provider_id will be set to 'default'

wb_user_id.title: Wb User Id
wb_user_id.description: Do not set directly. Server will automatically populate this field.

name.title: Name
name.description: The name of this dataset.  Datasets with the same name will be versioned together.

digest.title: Digest
digest.description: The digest of the created dataset

object_id.title: Object Id
object_id.description: The ID of the created dataset

version_index.title: Version Index
version_index.description: The version index of the created dataset

digest.title: Digest
digest.description: The digest of the dataset object

version_index.title: Version Index
version_index.description: The version index of the object

rows.title: Rows
rows.description: Reference to the dataset rows data

EqOperation.title: EqOperation
EqOperation.description:
Equality check between two operands.

Example:
    ```
    {
        "$eq": [{"$getField": "op_name"}, {"$literal": "predict"}]
    }
    ```

predict_total_tokens.title: Predict Total Tokens
predict_total_tokens.description: Sum of per-trial predict-only token usage for this evaluation (the model's predict() tokens only, excluding LLM-as-a-judge scorer usage); None when no trial reports usage.

predict_total_cost.title: Predict Total Cost
predict_total_cost.description: Sum of per-trial predict-only cost for this evaluation (the model's predict() cost only, excluding LLM-as-a-judge scorer cost); None when no trial reports cost.

evaluation_call_id.title: Evaluation Call Id
evaluation_call_id.description: When set, filter fields are scoped to this evaluation's data.

query.description: Filter expression. Supported field prefixes: scores.<name>, inputs.<path>, outputs.<path>.

EvalResultsFilter.title: EvalResultsFilter
EvalResultsFilter.description: A filter scoped to an optional evaluation.

evaluation_call_ids.title: Evaluation Call Ids
evaluation_call_ids.description: Evaluation root call IDs to include.

evaluation_run_ids.title: Evaluation Run Ids
evaluation_run_ids.description: Alias for evaluation call IDs from the Evaluation Runs API.

require_intersection.title: Require Intersection
require_intersection.description: When true, only include rows present in all requested evaluations.

include_raw_data_rows.title: Include Raw Data Rows
include_raw_data_rows.description: When true, populate raw_data_row on each result row. Inline rows are returned as their dict value; dataset-referenced rows are returned as the ref string unless resolve_row_refs is also true.

resolve_row_refs.title: Resolve Row Refs
resolve_row_refs.description: When true (requires include_raw_data_rows=True), resolve dataset-row reference strings to actual row data via a table lookup. When false, dataset-row refs are returned as-is.

include_rows.title: Include Rows
include_rows.description: When true, include grouped row/trial data in `rows` and compute `total_rows` for the requested row-level view.

include_summary.title: Include Summary
include_summary.description: When true, include aggregated scorer/evaluation summary data in `summary`.

summary_require_intersection.title: Summary Require Intersection
summary_require_intersection.description: Optional intersection behavior for the summary section. When null, the value of `require_intersection` is used.

include_predict_and_score_children.title: Include Predict And Score Children
include_predict_and_score_children.description: When true (default), fetch child calls (predict/score) of each predict_and_score call to populate predict_call_id, scorer_call_ids, and more precise latency/token data. When false, these fields are derived from the predict_and_score call itself (predict_call_id and scorer_call_ids will be null/empty).

include_costs.title: Include Costs
include_costs.description: When true, price each trial's predict call so rows and summary report predict-only cost (`total_cost` / `predict_total_cost`); scorer costs are excluded. Opt-in: other callers skip the cost computation.

sort_by.title: Sort By
sort_by.description: Sort specification for result rows. Supported field prefixes: scores.<name>, inputs.<path>, outputs.<path>. When null, rows are sorted by row_digest ASC.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Filters applied to grouped rows. Multiple filters are AND'd together.

filter_logic_operator.title: Filter Logic Operator
filter_logic_operator.description: How to combine filters across evaluations: 'and' (Match All - row must match in ALL evals) or 'or' (Match Any - row must match in ANY eval). Defaults to 'or' (Match Any).

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Optional row-level page size applied after grouping and intersection.

offset.title: Offset
offset.description: Optional row-level page offset applied after grouping and intersection.

warnings.title: Warnings
warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings (e.g. failed to resolve dataset row refs).

path.title: Path
path.description: Dot-joined subpath for nested dimensions, e.g. 'passed' for token_distance.passed. None for root-level scalar scorers.

value_type.title: Value Type
value_type.description: Type of the leaf value: binary (bool), continuous (number), or text (string).

EvalResultsScorerStats.title: EvalResultsScorerStats
EvalResultsScorerStats.description: Stats for a single flattened score dimension (scorer_key or scorer_key.path.to.leaf).

evaluation_call_id.title: Evaluation Call Id
evaluation_call_id.description: Scope the sort to a specific evaluation's scores.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: When 'value', sort by the field value for the specified evaluation. When 'difference', sort by max-min spread of the field across all evaluations (evaluation_call_id is ignored).

EvalResultsSortBy.title: EvalResultsSortBy
EvalResultsSortBy.description: Sort specification for evaluation results, extending SortBy

wb_user_id.title: Wb User Id
wb_user_id.description: Do not set directly. Server will automatically populate this field.

name.title: Name
name.description: The name of this evaluation.  Evaluations with the same name will be versioned together.

digest.title: Digest
digest.description: The digest of the created evaluation

object_id.title: Object Id
object_id.description: The ID of the created evaluation

version_index.title: Version Index
version_index.description: The version index of the created evaluation

evaluation_ref.title: Evaluation Ref
evaluation_ref.description: Full reference to the created evaluation

version_index.title: Version Index
version_index.description: The version index of the evaluation

predict_and_score_op.title: Predict And Score Op
predict_and_score_op.description: Predict and score op reference (weave:// URI)

source_evaluation_run_id.title: Source Evaluation Run Id
source_evaluation_run_id.description: Source evaluation run ID if this run was created by rescoring — provenance link

evaluation_run_id.title: Evaluation Run Id
evaluation_run_id.description: The ID of the created evaluation run

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: Optional summary dictionary for the evaluation run

EvaluationRunFinishBody.title: EvaluationRunFinishBody
EvaluationRunFinishBody.description:
Request body for finishing an evaluation run via REST API.

This model excludes project_id and evaluation_run_id since they come from the URL path in RESTful endpoints.

success.title: Success
success.description: Whether the evaluation run was finished successfully

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: Summary data for the evaluation run

source_evaluation_run_id.title: Source Evaluation Run Id
source_evaluation_run_id.description: Source evaluation run ID if this run was created by rescoring

time_bucket_start_ms.title: Time Bucket Start Ms
time_bucket_start_ms.description: Time bucket start, unix epoch ms (UTC). None when unbucketed.

group.title: Group
group.description: Group-by dimension values for this row (e.g. {'scorer_id': '...'}).

total_count.title: Total Count
total_count.description: Number of feedback rows in this bucket/group.

scored_count.title: Scored Count
scored_count.description: Rows that emitted a score (at least one tag or rating). Excludes agent-monitor rows that scored nothing — use this for score volume.

rating_counts.title: Rating Counts
rating_counts.description: Number of rows carrying each rating key (e.g. '_rating_').

rating_sums.title: Rating Sums
rating_sums.description: Sum of each rating key's values; client derives avg = sum/count.

FeedbackAggregateBucket.title: FeedbackAggregateBucket
FeedbackAggregateBucket.description: One (time bucket, group) row of aggregated scorer feedback.

after_ms.title: After Ms
after_ms.description: Inclusive lower bound on created_at (milliseconds since epoch).

before_ms.title: Before Ms
before_ms.description: Exclusive upper bound on created_at (milliseconds since epoch).

time_bucket_seconds.title: Time Bucket Seconds
time_bucket_seconds.description: Time bucket size in seconds, e.g. 3600 for 1h buckets

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Filter to feedback that includes any of the given tags

rating_min.title: Rating Min
rating_min.description: Include only rows with a rating >= this value

rating_max.title: Rating Max
rating_max.description: Include only rows with a rating <= this value

monitor_ids.title: Monitor Ids
monitor_ids.description: Filter to these monitor ids (exact match; suffix with '*' for prefix match).

scorer_ids.title: Scorer Ids
scorer_ids.description: Filter to these scorer ids (exact match; suffix with '*' for prefix match).

span_agent_names.title: Span Agent Names
span_agent_names.description: Filter to feedback whose span_agent_name matches any of these (exact).

span_types.title: Span Types
span_types.description: Filter by span type (turn vs conversation).

FeedbackAggregateReq.title: FeedbackAggregateReq
FeedbackAggregateReq.description: Query for aggregate scores by time bucket and dimension.

time_bucket_seconds.title: Time Bucket Seconds
time_bucket_seconds.description: Time bucket size used (seconds). None when unbucketed.

after_ms.title: After Ms
after_ms.description: Resolved inclusive lower bound, unix epoch ms (UTC).

before_ms.title: Before Ms
before_ms.description: Resolved exclusive upper bound, unix epoch ms (UTC).

FeedbackAggregateRes.title: FeedbackAggregateRes
FeedbackAggregateRes.description: Sparse time-series of aggregated scorer feedback (empty buckets omitted).

id.title: Id
id.description: If provided by the client, this ID will be used for the feedback row instead of a server-generated one.

queue_id.title: Queue Id
queue_id.description: The annotation queue ID this feedback was created from. References annotation_queues.id. NULL when feedback is created outside of queues.

scorer_tags.title: Scorer Tags
scorer_tags.description: Tags applied to the ref by a scorer

scorer_tag_reasons.title: Scorer Tag Reasons
scorer_tag_reasons.description: reason text per tag, keyed by tag name

scorer_tag_confidences.title: Scorer Tag Confidences
scorer_tag_confidences.description: confidence (0-1) per tag, keyed by tag name

scorer_ratings.title: Scorer Ratings
scorer_ratings.description: numeric ratings (0-1) keyed by rating name

scorer_rating_reasons.title: Scorer Rating Reasons
scorer_rating_reasons.description: reason text per rating, keyed by rating name

scorer_rating_confidences.title: Scorer Rating Confidences
scorer_rating_confidences.description: confidence (0-1) per rating, keyed by rating name

span_agent_name.title: Span Agent Name
span_agent_name.description: Display name of the scored agent (from spans.agent_name)

span_agent_version.title: Span Agent Version
span_agent_version.description: Version of the scored agent (from spans.agent_version)

span_status_code.title: Span Status Code
span_status_code.description: Status of the scored turn (from spans.status_code)

span_conversation_id.title: Span Conversation Id
span_conversation_id.description: Conversation the feedback belongs to (from spans.conversation_id)

span_trace_id.title: Span Trace Id
span_trace_id.description: Turn the feedback belongs to (from spans.trace_id)

wb_user_id.title: Wb User Id
wb_user_id.description: Do not set directly. Server will automatically populate this field.

value_type.title: Value Type
value_type.description: Type of value at path. numeric: avg/min/max; boolean: count_true/count_false.

aggregations.title: Aggregations
aggregations.description: Aggregation functions to compute. If empty, defaults are chosen based on value_type: numeric->avg/min/max, boolean->count_true/count_false.

percentiles.title: Percentiles
percentiles.description: Percentile values to compute (0–100), e.g. [5, 50, 95]. Only applicable for numeric value_type fields; ignored for boolean/categorical.

FeedbackMetricSpec.title: FeedbackMetricSpec
FeedbackMetricSpec.description: Specification for a feedback payload metric to aggregate.

value_type.title: Value Type
value_type.description: Inferred type of value at path.

FeedbackPayloadPath.title: FeedbackPayloadPath
FeedbackPayloadPath.description: Discovered path in feedback payload with inferred type.

end.title: End
end.description: Exclusive end time (UTC, ISO 8601). Defaults to now if omitted.

trigger_ref.title: Trigger Ref
trigger_ref.description: Filter by trigger_ref (exact or prefix match for all-versions).

sample_limit.title: Sample Limit
sample_limit.description: Max distinct trigger_refs to sample when discovering the payload schema. Each distinct trigger_ref (monitor/source) typically has a fixed payload structure, so sampling one payload per ref is usually enough to see the full schema. 2 000 covers virtually all real-world projects while keeping the query fast; the hard cap of 5 000 prevents runaway scans.

FeedbackPayloadSchemaReq.title: FeedbackPayloadSchemaReq
FeedbackPayloadSchemaReq.description: Request for feedback payload schema discovery.

paths.title: Paths
paths.description: Discovered leaf paths with inferred value types.

FeedbackPayloadSchemaRes.title: FeedbackPayloadSchemaRes
FeedbackPayloadSchemaRes.description: Response with discovered feedback payload paths and types.

id.title: Id
id.description: If provided by the client, this ID will be used for the feedback row instead of a server-generated one.

queue_id.title: Queue Id
queue_id.description: The annotation queue ID this feedback was created from. References annotation_queues.id. NULL when feedback is created outside of queues.

scorer_tags.description: Tags applied to the ref by a scorer

scorer_tag_reasons.description: reason text per tag, keyed by tag name

scorer_rating_confidences.description: confidence (0-1) per rating, keyed by rating name

span_agent_name.description: Display name of the scored agent (from spans.agent_name)

wb_user_id.description: Do not set directly. Server will automatically populate this field.

end.title: End
end.description: Exclusive end time (UTC, ISO 8601). Defaults to now if omitted.

trigger_ref.title: Trigger Ref
trigger_ref.description: Filter by trigger_ref (exact or prefix match for all-versions).

granularity.title: Granularity
granularity.description: Bucket size in seconds. If omitted, auto-selected based on time range.

FeedbackStatsReq.title: FeedbackStatsReq
FeedbackStatsReq.description: Request for aggregated feedback statistics over time buckets.

start.title: Start
start.description: Resolved start time (always UTC, regardless of the requested timezone).

end.title: End
end.description: Resolved end time (always UTC, regardless of the requested timezone).

buckets.title: Buckets
buckets.description: Time-bucketed aggregations. Each dict has 'timestamp' (ISO string), 'count' (int), and '{agg}_{slug}' keys for each requested metric+aggregation.

window_stats.title: Window Stats
window_stats.description: Aggregations over the full query window, keyed by metric slug (e.g. 'output_score'). Each value maps agg name to result.

range_start_int.title: Range Start Int
range_start_int.description: Start of IP range as integer

range_end_int.title: Range End Int
range_end_int.description: End of IP range as integer

range_start_ip.title: Range Start Ip
range_start_ip.description: Start of IP range in dotted decimal notation

range_end_ip.title: Range End Ip
range_end_ip.description: End of IP range in dotted decimal notation

country_code.title: Country Code
country_code.description: 2-letter country code in ISO 3166-1 Alpha 2 format

country_name.title: Country Name
country_name.description: Country name, None if could not be determined

ip.title: Ip
ip.description: Resolved IP address, useful for debugging

location.description: Information about the location of the IP address, None if could not be determined

allowed.title: Allowed
allowed.description: Whether the IP address is allowed to be used for inference.

GetFieldOperator.title: GetFieldOperator
GetFieldOperator.description:
Access a field on the traced call.

Supports dot notation for nested access, e.g. `summary.usage.tokens`.

Only works on fields present in the `CallSchema`, including:
- Top-level fields like `op_name`, `trace_id`, `started_at`
- Nested fields like `inputs.input_name`, `summary.usage.tokens`, etc.

Example:
    ```
    {"$getField": "op_name"}
    ```

GteOperation.title: GteOperation
GteOperation.description:
Greater than or equal comparison.

Example:
    ```
    {
        "$gte": [{"$getField": "summary.usage.tokens"}, {"$literal": 100}]
    }
    ```

wb_user_id.title: Wb User Id
wb_user_id.description: Do not set directly. Server will automatically populate this field.

track_llm_call.title: Track Llm Call
track_llm_call.description: Whether to track this image generation call in the trace server

InOperation.title: InOperation
InOperation.description:
Membership check.

Returns true if the left operand is in the list provided as the second operand.

Example:
    ```
    {
        "$in": [
            {"$getField": "op_name"},
            [{"$literal": "predict"}, {"$literal": "generate"}]
        ]
    }
    ```

cache_read_input_tokens_total_cost.title: Cache Read Input Tokens Total Cost

cache_creation_input_tokens_total_cost.title: Cache Creation Input Tokens Total Cost

LLMAggregatedUsage.title: LLMAggregatedUsage
LLMAggregatedUsage.description: Aggregated usage metrics for a specific LLM.

LiteralOperation.title: LiteralOperation
LiteralOperation.description:
Represents a constant value in the query language.

This can be any standard JSON-serializable value.

Example:
    ```
    {"$literal": "predict"}
    ```

LteOperation.title: LteOperation
LteOperation.description:
Less than or equal comparison.

Example:
    ```
    {
        "$lte": [{"$getField": "summary.usage.tokens"}, {"$literal": 100}]
    }
    ```

NormalizedMessage.title: NormalizedMessage
NormalizedMessage.description:
A single message normalized from any provider format.

Maps to ClickHouse ``Tuple(role String, content String, finish_reason String)``.

- role: message role (user, assistant, tool, system)
- content: plain text for simple messages, or JSON-serialized parts
  array for multimodal/structured messages
- finish_reason: per-message finish reason (output messages only)

digests.title: Digests

deleted_versions.title: Deleted Versions

sort_by.description: Sorting criteria for the query results. Currently only supports 'object_id' and 'created_at'.

include_tags_and_aliases.description: If true, tags and aliases are fetched and included in the response.

include_storage_size.description: If true, the `storage_size_bytes` column is returned.

digest.title: Digest
digest.description: The digest of the table to query

row_digests.title: Row Digests
row_digests.description: List of row digests to filter by

expected_digest.title: Expected Digest
expected_digest.description: Client-computed table digest for server-side validation.

updated_row_digests.title: Updated Row Digests
updated_row_digests.description: The digests of the rows that were updated

after_datetime.title: After Datetime
after_datetime.description: Only include threads with start_time after this timestamp

before_datetime.title: Before Datetime
before_datetime.description: Only include threads with last_updated before this timestamp

thread_ids.title: Thread Ids
thread_ids.description: Only include threads with thread_ids in this list

filter.description: Filter criteria for the threads query

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of threads to return

sort_by.title: Sort By
sort_by.description: Sorting criteria for the threads. Supported fields: 'thread_id', 'turn_count', 'start_time', 'last_updated', 'p50_turn_duration_ms', 'p99_turn_duration_ms'.

ThreadsQueryReq.title: ThreadsQueryReq
ThreadsQueryReq.description:
Query threads with aggregated statistics based on turn calls only.

Turn calls are the immediate children of thread contexts (where call.id == turn_id).
This provides meaningful conversation-level statistics rather than including all
nested implementation details.

filter.description: Filter to select calls. Typically use trace_ids to get all calls in a trace.

query.description: Additional query conditions for filtering calls.

include_costs.title: Include Costs
include_costs.description: If true, include cost calculations in the usage.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of calls to process. Acts as a safety limit to prevent unbounded memory usage.

TraceUsageReq.title: TraceUsageReq
TraceUsageReq.description:
Request to compute per-call usage for a trace, with descendant rollup.

This endpoint returns usage metrics for each call in the trace, where each
call's metrics include the sum of its own usage plus all descendants' usage.
Use this for trace view where you want to see rolled-up metrics per call.

Note: All matching calls are loaded into memory for aggregation. For very large
result sets (>10k calls), consider using more specific filters or pagination
at the application layer.

TraceUsageRes.title: TraceUsageRes
TraceUsageRes.description: Response with per-call usage metrics (each includes descendant contributions).

metric.title: Metric
metric.description: Metric to aggregate. Token metrics are normalized across providers.

percentiles.title: Percentiles
percentiles.description: Percentile values to compute (0-100). E.g., [50, 95, 99] for p50, p95, p99

UsageMetricSpec.title: UsageMetricSpec
UsageMetricSpec.description: Specification for a usage metric to aggregate (grouped by model).
